name: _DoIP_TCPPreSend
title: _DoIP_TCPPreSend
syntax: long _DoIP_TCPPreSend( BYTE DoIPVersion[], WORD payloadType[], DWORD payloadLen[], BYTE payload[]);
description: The DoIP implementation is about to send a TCP DoIP PDU with the given content. It is possible to change the values in header and data, to drop the PDU, and to reduce the length of the payload. Only DoIP PDUs with valid layout are sent.

parameters.name: DoIPVersion
parameters.description: Protocol version value to send, defaults to configured value.

parameters.name: payloadType
parameters.description: Type of the PDU sent. The value is converted from and to network byte order automatically.

parameters.name: payloadLen
parameters.description: Length of the payload as indicated in the header and actually sent. The value is converted from and to network byte order automatically.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: Payload itself. Elcount( payload) indicates the maximum number of bytes that can be accessed in the callback, and the maximum value payloadLen can be set to.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
